channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Anti-immigration protesters in Belfast set bus on fire amid unrest over knife attack – live
item.description: Anti-immigration protesters in Belfast set bus on fire amid unrest over knife attack – live

item.title: The Telegraph: Burnham ‘relied on deeply flawed analysis’ to pay out skyscraper loans - The Telegraph
item.description: Burnham ‘relied on deeply flawed analysis’ to pay out skyscraper loans - The Telegraph

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: This kind of thing really makes me think that come December, Keir Starmer will a) not be PM and b) not be my MP either.
item.description: This kind of thing really makes me think that come December, Keir Starmer will a) not be PM and b) not be my MP either.

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer to tell ministers to quit if they back Burnham
item.description: Starmer to tell ministers to quit if they back Burnham

item.title: i Politics: The radical new plan to scrap the state pension triple lock
item.description: The radical new plan to scrap the state pension triple lock

item.title: i Politics: Four ways Burnham could replace stamp duty
item.description: Four ways Burnham could replace stamp duty

item.title: Independent UK Politics: UK democracy under ‘immense strain’ with just 3% of voters able to tell if a video is real or AI, charity warns
item.description: UK democracy under ‘immense strain’ with just 3% of voters able to tell if a video is real or AI, charity warns

item.title: Novara Media: Andy Burnham Pledges to Expand Immigration Detention Centre Use
item.description: Andy Burnham Pledges to Expand Immigration Detention Centre Use

item.title: Independent UK Politics: UK set to defy Trump with social media ban for under-16s

item.title: i Politics: What Burnham as PM could mean for migration
item.description: What Burnham as PM could mean for migration
